channel.title: Utah Glizzies HC — Game Recaps
channel.description: Game-by-game recaps from Utah Glizzies HC — Sandy, Utah beer league hockey.

item.title: Back On The Grill: Glizzies 4, Zombonis 1
item.description: Playoff prep 4-1 win. Trey Kemp one-timer from a Hayden Rathmell feed. Back on track.

item.title: First Look Complete: Glizzies 5, Salt Shakers 3
item.description: Five goals. The Glizzies carry receipts into the playoff rematch on June 4.

item.title: Smokey Win: Glizzies 5, The Hive 3
item.description: Strong performance across all three periods. Five goals against The Hive.

item.title: Tight Win: Glizzies 3, The Misfits 2
item.description: One-goal playoff DNA win. Held the lead in the final period.

item.title: Season Opener Statement: Glizzies 7, Raiders 0
item.description: 7-0 shutout to open Spring 2026. The grill was lit from puck drop.
